ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "logo" TEXT /* Logo of the team */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "website" TEXT /* Team's official website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the team's social media profiles */,
  "team_color" TEXT /* Primary color of the team's uniform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matchdays" (
  "matchday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each matchday */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the matchday */,
  "match_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule of matches on the matchday */,
  "location" TEXT /* Venue where the matchday is held */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions on the matchday */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators attending the matchday */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("matchday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "matchday_id" INTEGER /* ID of the matchday the match belongs to */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team */,
  "ft_score" TEXT /* Full-time score of the match */,
  "ht_score" TEXT /* Half-time score of the match */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the match */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Specific venue where the match is played */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed, postponed) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators attending the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee for the match */,
  "linesman1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first linesman for the match */,
  "linesman2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second linesman for the match */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., league, friendly, cup) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_linesman1_id FOREIGN KEY ("linesman1_id") REFERENCES match_officials ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_matchday_id FOREIGN KEY ("matchday_id") REFERENCES matchdays ("matchday_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES match_officials ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_linesman2_id FOREIGN KEY ("linesman2_id") REFERENCES match_officials ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match official */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Name of the match official */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the match official (e.g., referee, linesman) */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the match official */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "certification_level" TEXT /* Level of certification (e.g., national, international) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "official_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the official is assigned to */,
  "official_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match official */,
  "assignment_status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., confirmed, pending, declined) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_official_assignments_official_id FOREIGN KEY ("official_id") REFERENCES match_officials ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_official_assignments_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference (goals for - goals against) */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of matches without conceding a goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "league_standings" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team in the league */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points earned by the team */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team in the league */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team in the league */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference in the league */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of matches without conceding a goal in the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., league administrator, team manager, match official) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_teams" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is assigned to */,
  "role_in_team" TEXT /* Specific role of the user within the team (e.g., manager, assistant manager, coach) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_teams_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
